pkgmetadata.longdescription: openvpn3-indicator is a simple GTK tray indicator application that controls OpenVPN 3 Linux tunnels. It talks to the D-Bus interface provided by the OpenVPN 3 Linux client and does not require elevated privileges to use. It is intended as a temporary work-around until Network Manager implements support for OpenVPN 3, or OpenVPN provides an official graphical interface for Linux.
